title: Entity Schema
description: Schema for defining entities in the Dungeon Crawler World.

skills.description: A list of skills associated with the entity.
skills.$comment: Each skill should match an existing skill in the skills folder.

spells.description: A list of spells associated with the entity.
spells.$comment: Each spell should match an existing spell in the spells folder.

effects.description: A list of effects associated with the entity.
effects.$comment: Each effect should match an existing effect in the effects folder.

items.description: A list of items associated with the entity.
items.$comment: Each item should match an existing item in the items folder.
